title: Project Hail Mary
body: An absolutely thrilling solo survival story set in space. Weir somehow made astrophysics funny and heartfelt. Highly recommend.

title: Atomic Habits
body: Clear and practical advice on building good habits. The 1% improvement concept genuinely changed how I think about progress.

title: The Great Gatsby
body: Classic American novel about wealth, love, and the hollow pursuit of the American Dream. Fitzgerald's prose is stunning.

title: Sapiens
body: A sweeping history of humankind from the Stone Age to the present. Sometimes controversial, always thought-provoking.

title: The Name of the Wind
body: Just started this one and I can already tell it's going to be a favourite. Check back for the full review!
